ai_tokens.title: AI quota at {percent}%
ai_tokens.body: Organisation {orgName} has consumed {percent}% of its AI token quota.

storage.title: Storage at {percent}%
storage.body: Organisation {orgName} has used {percent}% of its storage space.

removed.title: {memberName} was removed from the organisation
removed.titleSelf: You were removed from the organisation {orgName}

downgraded.title: Plan downgraded to {toPlan}
downgraded.body: Your organisation's plan changed from {fromPlan} to {toPlan}.

upgraded.title: Plan upgraded to {toPlan}
upgraded.body: Your organisation's plan changed from {fromPlan} to {toPlan}.

deactivated.title: {module} module deactivated
deactivated.body: The {module} module was removed from your subscription. Your data stays available in read-only mode.

overdue.title: Overdue maintenance on {boatName}
overdue.body: {count, plural, one {# maintenance task is overdue} other {# maintenance tasks are overdue}} on {boatName}.

due_soon.title: Upcoming maintenance on {boatName}
due_soon.body: {count, plural, one {# maintenance task is due soon} other {# maintenance tasks are due soon}} on {boatName}.

expiring_soon.title: Documents to renew on {boatName}
expiring_soon.body: {count, plural, one {# document on {boatName} is expiring soon.} other {# documents on {boatName} are expiring soon.}}

expired.title: Expired documents on {boatName}
expired.body: {count, plural, one {# document on {boatName} has expired.} other {# documents on {boatName} have expired.}}

expiring_soon.title: Safety equipment to check on {boatName}
expiring_soon.body: {count, plural, one {# safety equipment item on {boatName} is expiring soon.} other {# safety equipment items on {boatName} are expiring soon.}}

expired.title: Expired safety equipment on {boatName}
expired.body: {count, plural, one {# safety equipment item on {boatName} has expired.} other {# safety equipment items on {boatName} have expired.}}
